items.name: 佐野家文書
items.subcategory: 美術工芸品　古文書

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the category of fine arts and crafts, old documents, consisting of documents of the Sano family. It is a municipally designated property located in Kushiro City, designated on 12 December 1975.

items.name: 市河文書
items.subcategory: 美術工芸品　古文書

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the category of fine arts and crafts, old documents, consisting of the Ichikawa documents. It is a municipally designated property located in Kushiro City, designated on 9 December 1976.

items.name: 星兜（残欠）
items.subcategory: 美術工芸品　考古資料

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the category of fine arts and crafts, archaeological materials, consisting of a fragmentary star-riveted (hoshikabuto) helmet. It is a municipally designated property located in Kushiro City, designated on 12 December 1975.

items.name: 永久保秀二郎日誌
items.subcategory: 美術工芸品　歴史資料

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the category of fine arts and crafts, historical materials, consisting of the diary of Nagakubo Hidejirō. It is a municipally designated property located in Kushiro City, designated on 12 December 1975.

items.name: 釧路新聞
items.subcategory: 美術工芸品　歴史資料

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the category of fine arts and crafts, historical materials, consisting of the Kushiro Shinbun newspaper. It is a municipally designated property located in Kushiro City, designated on 12 December 1975.

items.name: 鳥取村本籍簿
items.subcategory: 美術工芸品　歴史資料

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the category of fine arts and crafts, historical materials, consisting of the family register (honsekibo) of Tottori Village. It is a municipally designated property located in Kushiro City, designated on 12 December 1975.
An intangible folk cultural property consisting of a kagura sacred performance. It is a municipally designated property located in Kushiro City, designated on 5 October 1986.

items.name: 三津浦古谷遺跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A historic site in the form of an archaeological site. It is a municipally designated property located in Kushiro City, designated on 12 December 1975.

items.name: キタサンショウウオ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A natural monument consisting of the Siberian salamander (Kita-sanshōuo). It is a municipally designated property located in Kushiro City, designated on 12 December 1975.

items.name: 砂岩脈（サンド・ストーン・ダイク）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A natural monument consisting of a sandstone dike (sand-stone dike). It is a municipally designated property located in Kushiro City, designated on 12 December 1975.

items.name: 谷地坊主（ヤチボウズ）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A natural monument consisting of yachibōzu (tussock mounds). It is a municipally designated property located in Kushiro City, designated on 12 December 1975.
